items.title: Tarris Reed Jr. called losing the national title “probably the toughest moment of my life” and that both he and his new teammates will have chips on their shoulders next season. “I feel like that's going to be huge for us next year,” he said.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: Tarris Reed Jr. called losing the national title “probably the toughest moment of my life” and that both he and his new teammates will have chips on their shoulders next season. “I feel like that's going to be huge for us next year,” he said.

items.title: Sources: The San Antonio Spurs will select Trevon Brazile with the No. 35 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brazile is going to the Denver Nuggets as part of the Tarris Reed Jr. (No. 26 pick) trade.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The San Antonio Spurs will select Trevon Brazile with the No. 35 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Brazile is going to the Denver Nuggets as part of the Tarris Reed Jr. (No. 26 pick) trade.

items.title: Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.

"Guys were in the paint, hacking, bruising, all that. I got the body for it and I embrace the physical game.That's a huge part of who I am and how I play."

items.title: The Spurs taking Quaintance and Tarris Reed Jr. is interesting. I like both prospects a lot, but this is almost like a hedge because of Quaintance's injury concerns. Reed was among the best remaining options for the Celtics.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt: The Spurs taking Quaintance and Tarris Reed Jr. is interesting. I like both prospects a lot, but this is almost like a hedge because of Quaintance's injury concerns. Reed was among the best remaining options for the Celtics.

items.title: TRADE: The Denver Nuggets will select Tarris Reed Jr. with the No. 26 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft and are trading him to the San Antonio Spurs for pick No. 35 and two future second round picks, league sources say.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: TRADE: The Denver Nuggets will select Tarris Reed Jr. with the No. 26 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft and are trading him to the San Antonio Spurs for pick No. 35 and two future second round picks, league sources say.
